summary: Frontend-only testing of Space Orbit Lab educational app. All major features tested: home page, navigation, learn page, quiz flow, explore page, and dashboard.

issues: Locked orbits show lock icon but no explicit 'LOCKED' text label - minor UX note only

critical_code_review_comments: XP state resets between browser sessions as expected (localStorage-based) - this is by design
3D Earth uses R3F Canvas - WebGL GPU stall warnings in console (performance, non-blocking)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features verified working: home hero, nav bar (LEARN/EXPLORE/QUIZ/MISSION LOG), learn page with sidebar (LEO/POLAR/GEO unlocked, others locked with lock icons), step navigation (PREV/NEXT, 1/5 to 5/5), COMPLETE +50 XP button, quiz page with mission grid, question/answer flow with XP awarded (+20 XP per correct), explanation after answer, explore page with 4 sliders + orbital data display + 12 preset buttons, dashboard showing Total XP/Orbits Unlocked/Lessons Done/Quizzes Taken stats + orbit library with LEARN/QUIZ buttons.

test_results.home_page: PASS - Hero text 'THE VOID NAVIGATOR' visible, 3D Earth renders, nav links all visible, XP=0 counter shown
test_results.navigation: PASS - LEARN, EXPLORE, QUIZ, MISSION LOG all clickable
test_results.learn_page: PASS - LEO/POLAR/GEO unlocked in sidebar, other orbits show lock icon, orbit info panel shows, step navigation 1/5 through 5/5 works
test_results.lesson_completion: PASS - COMPLETE +50 XP button on step 5/5, toast shows 'Lesson complete! +50 XP earned', button changes to COMPLETED
test_results.quiz_page: PASS - Mission grid shows LEO/POLAR/GEO unlocked with START, locked orbits show 'NEED X XP', quiz starts with multiple choice questions
test_results.quiz_answer_flow: PASS - Selecting correct answer highlights green with checkmark, shows EXPLANATION panel, +20 XP toast, NEXT button appears
test_results.explore_page: PASS - 4 sliders (semi-major axis, eccentricity, inclination, RAAN), orbital data display (type/semi-major/perigee/apogee/period/inclination/eccentricity), 12 preset buttons (LEO/Polar/GEO/SSO/MEO/HEO/Molniya/Tundra/Graveyard/Hohmann/L-Points + Reset)
test_results.dashboard: PASS - Shows Total XP, Orbits Unlocked (3/11), Lessons Done, Quizzes Taken, mission progress bar, next unlock info, orbit library with LEO/POLAR/GEO cards with LEARN/QUIZ buttons
